title: Top to Bottom
brief: Jump through a longer file and fix a status near the bottom.
hints: Fastest route: /BROKEN then Enter to jump directly to the target line.
On BROKEN, use ciwGREEN and press Esc.
primary_path: Use `ciwGREEN`, save with `:w`, then run `./stage check`.
fallback_path: Use `G` to jump to bottom first, then `/BROKEN` if needed.
Use `cw` as fallback if `ciw` feels awkward.
why_path: Search is more relevant than scrolling because the file is long and has one precise target token.
pro_move: Search beats scrolling in almost every case.
